name: diagGetConfiguredVariant
title: diagGetConfiguredVariant
description: Retrieves the qualifier of the variant that is configured for the current target.

Retrieve the qualifier of the variant that is configured for the current or given target in the Diagnostics configuration dialog. It is possible to provide this qualifier to the automatic variant identification algorithm.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: ECU the identification algorithm should run for, not the currently selected one. If given, diagSetTarget does not have to be called.

return:
Length of qualifier written to buffer, may be truncated.
0: No error, OK
<0: Error code
Especially:-94: No target was selected
